message.content:
In the file /home/runner/workspace/client/src/pages/tender-details.tsx, look at the JSX return statement carefully. 1. Find the line that says `{/* Content Area */}` and the `
` that follows it (around line 657-658) 2. Count ALL `` closings from that line until the line right BEFORE `{/* Submit Offer Modal */}` 3. Tell me: are they balanced? How many opens vs closes? 4. Also look at the entire return() statement and tell me if the total JSX div tags balance (equal number of opening and closing div tags) 5. Also look at the lines JUST around where the closing of the main column div is (around line 1310) and verify it properly closes the `
` that opened at line 662 Report the exact counts and any imbalance found.
